_note: Constants marked 'assumed' are literature-seeded placeholders. Replace with field-fit values from controlled observations.

costCurveBase_meta.citation: Back-calculated from gain ratio of two metrics at different values in same investment cycle. Structural constant — exponential cost shape is domain-agnostic.

costCurveDecay_meta.citation: CV 3.2% across 5 observations. Transfer assumption: exponential cost shape is domain-agnostic. Recalibrate once field maintenance data is available.

baseResourcesPerCycle_meta.citation: Placeholder — must be back-calculated from first controlled field maintenance observations (before/after metric readings for known intervention count).

cycleBudgetDecay_meta.citation: Geometric decay confirmed in source domain (×114 cycle run, error -1 CCI). Decay constant 0.99 may differ for logistics interventions — recalibrate from repeated-intervention field data.

secondaryMetricWeight_meta.citation: Placeholder — secondary metric cost penalty. Calibrate from operational data by comparing primary vs secondary metric gain rates under identical intervention budgets.

capacityCeiling_meta.citation: Placeholder ceiling — replace with domain-specific CeilingRule[] entries (Phase B). This scalar will be deprecated once CeilingRule is active.

maturityMultipliers_meta.citation: Placeholder maturity table keyed by lifecycle stage index. Calibrate from field operational data comparing intervention effectiveness across asset maturity cohorts.

efficiencyClassMultipliers_meta.citation: Placeholder efficiency class multipliers. Calibrate from asset specification data and observed intervention response rates.
